_metadata.title: ComplianceLint Interim Standard for EU AI Act Article 51: Classification of GPAI Models with Systemic Risk
_metadata.disclaimer: This is an interim standard developed by ComplianceLint. It will be superseded by the CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard.
_metadata.awaiting_standard: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 51 (expected Q4 2026)

requirements.title: Cumulative FLOPs Threshold Assessment
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST assess whether the cumulative amount of computation used for training the GPAI model exceeds 10^25 FLOPs.
requirements.rationale: Art. 51(2) sets 10^25 FLOPs as the presumptive threshold for systemic risk classification.
acceptable_implementations: Documented computation log tracking total training FLOPs
Training infrastructure records with FLOPs estimation methodology
Third-party audit of training compute expenditure

requirements.title: High-Impact Capabilities Evaluation
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST evaluate whether the GPAI model has high-impact capabilities based on Annex XIII criteria, independent of the FLOPs threshold.
requirements.rationale: Art. 51(1)(b) allows Commission designation based on high-impact capabilities per Annex XIII criteria.
acceptable_implementations: Structured capability evaluation against Annex XIII criteria
Benchmark suite covering high-impact capability domains
Red-team evaluation report assessing systemic risk potential

requirements.title: Classification Record Maintenance
requirements.requirement: The provider MUST maintain records documenting the classification outcome and supporting evidence.
requirements.rationale: Art. 51 requires providers to know and document their classification status for regulatory compliance.
acceptable_implementations: Classification decision document with FLOPs calculation and capability assessment
Internal classification register with periodic review schedule
Auditable classification trail with version history

scoring.partial: R01 met, R02 or R03 incomplete
